title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
